\caption{Survey of VRDU models grouped by OCR dependency. Groups: \textbf{Yes}\,=\,OCR required at inference; \textbf{No}\,=\,OCR not required at inference. $^*$\,next to a model name has group-dependent meaning: \textbf{Yes\textsuperscript{*}}\,=\,model is not strictly OCR-dependent but incorporates OCR as a framework component; \textbf{No\textsuperscript{*}}\,=\,OCR was used explicitly during training but is not required at inference. \textbf{Architecture} abbreviations: HDT\,=\,Hierarchical Document Transformer; BC-MLLM\,=\,Backbone-Centric MLLM Adaptation; RAG\,=\,Retriever-Generator; AP\,=\,Agentic Pipeline. \textbf{Mod.}: input modality (T\,=\,text, V\,=\,visual, L\,=\,layout). \textbf{RAG Strat.}: retrieval strategy (Dense, Sparse, Joint\,=\,both). \textbf{Prompt Strat.}: prompting strategy (CoT\,=\,Chain of Thought; ReAct\,=\,Reason\,+\,Act). \textbf{Agentic}: agentic workflow type (Open\,=\,open-ended tool use; Fixed\,=\,fixed pipeline). `--' indicates not reported.}
\label{tab:model_survey_ocr}
\end{table*}
